thinking: I move down a narrow cafe/kitchen area toward a yellow rectangular table on the left where one female customer is seated alone on the far side. As I approach, more of the kitchen becomes visible behind her: blue lower cabinets, sink, countertop appliances, stove pots, and a tall cream refrigerator. The customer first raises a hand to her forehead/face, then lowers it and sits facing me quietly with her hands near her lap or the table edge. Near the end, I stop beside the table and extend my hands forward over the tabletop toward her, as if greeting her, presenting something, or preparing to take her order.
caption: CLERK: I appeared to approach the seated customer to attend to her table, and I did this by walking up beside the yellow table and reaching my hands out over it. CUSTOMER: She appeared to want service or attention while seated, expressing this by remaining at the table, looking toward me, and briefly touching her face before waiting calmly.
